untranslatable_reason: Signal requires z-score of OLS residuals from pairs trading (spread measurement via linear regression hedge ratio and residual time series). Z-score calculation on custom residuals is not available in the allowed indicator set. The signal specifically calls for abs(zscore_last) <= 1.0, which cannot be expressed using only the provided indicators (price, moving averages, RSI, ATR, Bollinger, MACD, ADX, Stochastic, Donchian, Pivots, Volume, Position, Returns, Bar Properties). This is a pairs/statistical arbitrage signal requiring custom quantitative inputs.
translation_notes: Original signal is a pairs trading mean-reversion exit rule. It requires: (1) OLS regression between two assets to calculate hedge ratio, (2) residuals time series construction, (3) z-score normalization of residuals. None of these intermediate calculations are available as pre-computed indicators. A generic mean-reversion approximation using price and moving average crossover has been provided as a fallback, but it does not capture the true pairs trading logic.
